QF.id: VII Other Services Provided by Brokers_31

question.text: Under SEBI Research Analysts Regulations, providing research as a 'value-added service' even without a separate fee requires:

answer.text: Mandatory SEBI registration as Research Analyst
No registration if no fee is charged

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Providing research reports even as a value-added service without separate fee requires mandatory SEBI registration under RA Regulations. **The Trap:** The registration requirement applies regardless of whether a separate fee is charged. **Cross-Exam Context:** This prevents unregistered entities from providing investment research. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** All associated persons of the research entity must hold valid NISM certification.
